# wa-dashboard (v0.1.10)

> Full-stack web application template built with Bun, Elysia, React 19, and Vite.

This file is auto-generated by `bun run docs:llms`. Do not edit by hand —
it is rebuilt from package.json, the route catalog, Prisma schema, env catalog,
CHANGELOG.md, and the docs/ folder. Edit those sources instead.

## Documentation
- [CLAUDE](CLAUDE.md): Project overview, runtime/tooling commands, folder structure
- [README](README.md): Human-facing setup and tech stack
- [API](docs/API.md): All HTTP route definitions and contracts
- [AUTH](docs/AUTH.md): Auth flow, roles, sessions, ticket status machine
- [DATABASE](docs/DATABASE.md): Prisma schema, Redis namespaces, audit logs
- [FRONTEND](docs/FRONTEND.md): React routes, hooks, components, UI conventions
- [MCP](docs/MCP.md): MCP server tools and HTTP fallback
- [WA-POLICY](docs/WA-POLICY.md): WhatsApp anti-ban policy contract and enforcement
- [SCALING](docs/SCALING.md): Performance and scaling playbook
- [FILE-HEALTH](docs/FILE-HEALTH.md): File size limits and split rules
- [FEATURE-CHECKLIST](docs/FEATURE-CHECKLIST.md): Required steps when adding a feature
- [AI_CONTRACT](docs/AI_CONTRACT.md): Working contract for AI agents in this repo

## API Routes

### frontend
- `PAGE /` (public) — Landing page
- `PAGE /login` (public) — Login page (email/password + Google OAuth)
- `PAGE /dev` (superAdmin) — Dev console (SUPER_ADMIN only)
- `PAGE /dashboard` (admin) — Admin dashboard (ADMIN+)
- `PAGE /profile` (authenticated) — User profile (all authenticated)
- `PAGE /blocked` (authenticated) — Blocked user info page

### auth
- `POST /api/auth/sign-in/email` (public) — Email/password sign in
- `POST /api/auth/sign-up/email` (public) — Email/password sign up
- `POST /api/auth/sign-out` (authenticated) — Sign out (delete session)
- `GET /api/auth/get-session` (public) — Get current session
- `GET /api/auth/sign-in/social` (public) — Google OAuth redirect
- `GET /api/auth/callback/google` (public) — Google OAuth callback
- `GET /api/dev-auth/login-as/:email` (public) — Dev-only: login as any user by email (development only)

### admin
- `GET /api/admin/users` (superAdmin) — List all users
- `PUT /api/admin/users/:id/role` (superAdmin) — Change user role
- `PUT /api/admin/users/:id/block` (superAdmin) — Block/unblock user
- `GET /api/admin/presence` (superAdmin) — Online user IDs
- `GET /api/admin/logs/app` (superAdmin) — App logs (Redis)
- `GET /api/admin/logs/audit` (superAdmin) — Audit logs (DB)
- `DELETE /api/admin/logs/app` (superAdmin) — Clear app logs
- `DELETE /api/admin/logs/audit` (superAdmin) — Clear audit logs
- `GET /api/admin/schema` (superAdmin) — Database schema (Prisma)
- `GET /api/admin/routes` (superAdmin) — Routes metadata
- `GET /api/admin/project-structure` (superAdmin) — Project file structure
- `GET /api/admin/env-map` (superAdmin) — Environment variables map
- `GET /api/admin/test-coverage` (superAdmin) — Test coverage mapping
- `GET /api/admin/dependencies` (superAdmin) — NPM dependencies graph
- `GET /api/admin/migrations` (superAdmin) — Migration timeline
- `GET /api/admin/sessions` (superAdmin) — Active sessions (live)
- `GET /api/admin/file-health` (superAdmin) — File health scan

### tickets
- `GET /api/tickets` (qcOrAdmin) — List tickets
- `POST /api/tickets` (qcOrAdmin) — Create ticket
- `GET /api/tickets/:id` (qcOrAdmin) — Get ticket detail
- `PATCH /api/tickets/:id` (qcOrAdmin) — Update ticket
- `POST /api/tickets/:id/comments` (qcOrAdmin) — Add comment
- `POST /api/tickets/:id/evidence` (qcOrAdmin) — Attach evidence

### utility
- `GET /health` (public) — Health check
- `GET /llms.txt` (public) — LLM-friendly project summary (auto-generated)
- `GET /api/version` (public) — App version
- `GET /api/hello` (public) — Hello world (GET)
- `PUT /api/hello` (public) — Hello world (PUT)
- `GET /api/hello/:name` (public) — Hello with name param
- `GET /api/docs` (public) — Swagger UI — API documentation

### realtime
- `WS /ws/presence` (authenticated) — Real-time presence tracking

### mcp
- `ALL /mcp` (secret) — MCP over HTTP (MCP_SECRET bearer)

## Database Schema

### Enums
- **Role**: USER | QC | ADMIN | SUPER_ADMIN
- **TicketStatus**: OPEN | IN_PROGRESS | READY_FOR_QC | REOPENED | CLOSED
- **TicketPriority**: LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH | CRITICAL
- **VerifyStatus**: PENDING | VERIFIED | EXPIRED
- **VerifyDelivery**: PENDING | DELIVERED | FAILED | DISABLED

### Models
- **User** (table `user`): id, name, email, emailVerified, image, password, role, blocked, createdAt, updatedAt, sessions, accounts, auditLogs, reported, assigned, comments
- **Session** (table `session`): id, token, userId, expiresAt, createdAt, updatedAt, ipAddress, userAgent, user
- **Account** (table `account`): id, accountId, providerId, userId, accessToken, refreshToken, idToken, accessTokenExpiresAt, refreshTokenExpiresAt, scope, password, createdAt, updatedAt, user
- **Verification** (table `verification`): id, identifier, value, expiresAt, createdAt, updatedAt
- **AuditLog** (table `audit_log`): id, userId, action, detail, ip, createdAt, user
- **Ticket** (table `ticket`): id, title, description, status, priority, route, reporterId, assigneeId, createdAt, updatedAt, closedAt, deletedAt, reporter, assignee, comments, evidence
- **TicketComment** (table `ticket_comment`): id, ticketId, authorId, authorTag, body, createdAt, ticket, author
- **TicketEvidence** (table `ticket_evidence`): id, ticketId, kind, url, note, createdAt, ticket
- **WaPolicy** (table `wa_policy`): id, allowFirstContact, maxPerMinute, maxPerHour, maxPerDay, minIntervalSeconds, perRecipientCooldownSeconds, requireAck, contractVersion, verifyReplyEnabled, verifyReplyMessage, updatedAt, updatedById
- **VerifyConsumer** (table `verify_consumer`): id, name, apiKeyHash, apiKeyPrefix, webhookUrl, webhookSecret, active, createdById, createdAt, updatedAt, requests
- **VerifyRequest** (table `verify_request`): id, consumerId, token, expectedPhone, status, matchedPhone, matchedMessageId, expiresAt, verifiedAt, deliveryStatus, deliveryAttempts, lastDeliveryAt, lastDeliveryError, replySentAt, createdAt, consumer
- **VerifyInboundLog** (table `verify_inbound_log`): id, sessionId, fromMasked, tokenFound, matched, consumerId, createdAt

## Environment Variables
- `DATABASE_URL` (required) — PostgreSQL connection string
- `REDIS_URL` (required) — Redis connection string
- `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` (required) — Google OAuth client ID
- `GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET` (required) — Google OAuth client secret
- `BETTER_AUTH_SECRET` (required) — Better Auth encryption secret (min 32 chars)
- `BETTER_AUTH_URL` (optional, default: http://localhost:3000) — Better Auth base URL (production URL)
- `SUPER_ADMIN_EMAIL` (optional, default: (empty)) — Comma-separated emails to auto-promote to SUPER_ADMIN
- `PORT` (optional, default: 3000) — Server port
- `HMR_PORT` (optional, default: 24678) — Vite HMR WebSocket port (dev only)
- `NODE_ENV` (optional, default: development) — Environment mode
- `REACT_EDITOR` (optional, default: code) — Editor for click-to-source
- `AUDIT_LOG_RETENTION_DAYS` (optional, default: 90) — Days to keep audit logs

## Recent Changes

### 0.1.11 — 2026-07-01
- Added: **Balasan otomatis WhatsApp saat verifikasi (WAV) berhasil** — nomor server dapat membalas user dengan pesan "berhasil" saat verifikasi sukses (aman: reply-to-inbound, bukan cold outreach). **Default MATI** (`WaPolicy.verifyReplyEnabled=false`) agar nomor server tetap receive-only sampai sengaja dinyalakan di `/wa?tab=policy` (SUPER_ADMIN). Teks bisa diedit kapanpun (`verifyReplyMessage`) dengan **default yang bisa dikembalikan** (kosong/null → varian default di kode, dipilih deterministik per-request agar tak seragam identik). Balasan dipicu best-effort dari `handleInbound` via `sendVerifyReply()` (`src/lib/wa-verify-reply.ts`): **idempoten** (`VerifyRequest.replySentAt` claim-then-send, cegah dobel dari poller re-run), tergate **rate-only** (`checkAndConsume(..., { skipOutreachGates: true })` — lewati ack & first-contact yang khusus kirim-duluan, tetap tunduk min-interval/cooldown/plafon; plafon tercapai → balasan di-skip diam, verifikasi tetap sukses), audit `WA_VERIFY_REPLY_SENT`. Zero PII (teks tak menyisipkan nomor/token). Field baru `WaPolicy.verifyReplyEnabled`/`verifyReplyMessage` + `VerifyRequest.replySentAt`.

### 0.1.10 — 2026-07-01
- Changed: **Konsolidasi navigasi WhatsApp ke satu menu `/wa`** — panel operator **WA Sessions** dan **Simulasi Login WAV** yang sebelumnya tersebar (tab `/dev?tab=wa-sessions` dan route standalone `/simulation`) kini menjadi tab di dalam `/wa` (`?tab=sessions` & `?tab=simulation`), khusus SUPER_ADMIN di bawah divider "Operator". Sidebar `/dev` menyisakan satu link "WhatsApp" sebagai entry-point tunggal. Route `/simulation` dihapus (komponen `SimLoginPanel` dipakai ulang sebagai tab). Tak ada perubahan endpoint/backend — semua REST WAV (`/api/wa/verify/sim/*`, `/api/admin/wa-sessions`) tetap sama.

### 0.1.9 — 2026-06-30
- Fixed: **Verifikasi nomor (WAV) tidak pernah jalan di produksi/staging** — request verifikasi selalu PENDING walau `WA_VERIFY_SERVER_NUMBER` sudah diset. Penyebab: `startWaVerifySupervisor()` (plus `sweepWaVerify()` dan audit cleanup) hanya dipanggil di entry dev `src/index.tsx`, sedangkan produksi menjalankan binary dari `src/server.prod.ts` yang tidak pernah memanggilnya — supervisor capture poller tak pernah boot (`running:false`, `serverNumber:null`), token masuk tak tertangkap. Semua boot task kini diekstrak ke `src/lib/startup.ts` (`runStartupTasks()`) yang dipanggil **kedua** entry, plus test guard anti-drift. Wajib redeploy agar aktif.
- Fixed: **Tool MCP `debug-stg` rusak (protokol usang)** — seluruh tool inspeksi staging via `POST /mcp` membalas 400 "Invalid JSON-RPC message". Endpoint `/mcp` sudah memakai MCP Streamable HTTP standar (`tools/call`), tapi tool masih mengirim body lama `{tool, input}` dan tanpa header `Accept` (406). Ditambahkan helper `mcpCallBody`/`unwrapMcpEnvelope`/`stgMcpCall` di `scripts/mcp/tools/stg-fetch.ts`; 22 call-site dialihkan ke JSON-RPC standar + header `Accept` yang benar.
